name: Fractal Fly-By
description: An endless cinematic flight THROUGH an enclosed Mandelbox cathedral-world — travelling between and past towering recursive architecture, corridors opening into further corridors. The Rrrola/Fragmentarium Mandelbox distance estimator (ported, FA #73) driven by a self-similar scale traversal toward a detailed boundary point; the music's energy drives how fast you travel and a bass swell opens the fold into a larger space. Enclosed — no sky. Jewel stained-glass palette with three materials (shaded jewelled stone, thin-film iridescent fold rims, emissive deep-recess votives), resolved by MetalFX Temporal AA (MFX.1).
author: Matt
